title: andryala spartioides
intro: Andryala spartioides, also known as the mountain everlasting or spartioides andryala, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used traditionally in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Andryala spartioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
